sources.cleaned_content:
Q²M COATING APPLICATOR

Exterior / Accessories

Dedicated soft coating applicator.

The Q²M Coating Applicator is designed specifically for ceramic coating application, offering a safe, precise and efficient way to apply coatings to all exterior surfaces. Its construction focuses on accuracy, comfort and reduced product waste during application.

Product image: https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/productmain_1700x1645px_coating_applicator_2021-1024x991.png

HOW TO USE

01. Choose the appropriate applicator size depending on the surface.
02. Apply coating directly onto the suede or short nap side of the applicator.
03. Spread evenly over the surface using overlapping motions.
04. Monitor saturation and replace when needed.
05. Dispose or clean according to the coating used.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

01. What makes Q²M Coating Applicator different from regular sponge applicators?
It features an inner liner that prevents coating from soaking into the foam, improving efficiency.

02. Why does it have two different surfaces?
One side uses suede for precise coating application, the other uses short hair microfibre for controlled spreading.

03. Is it safe on all exterior surfaces?
Yes, it has no sharp edges and is designed for safe use on all surfaces to be coated, inside and out.

04. Are different sizes available?
Yes, it is available in Light and Large versions depending on the working area.

05. Is it suitable for professional use?
Yes, it is designed for both enthusiasts and professional detailers.

Product Description:
The Gyeon Coating Applicator 2 Pack is a soft applicator designed for easy coating application. It is double sided and very soft to ensure safe applications. It offers a suede side for precise application and a short hair microfiber style on the other side. There are no rough edges and virtually no risk of damage. It comes in a two-pack, so you have multiple applicators for each coating application.

Measures: 5" x 3" x 1.25"

From The Label:
The perfect size and shape to effectively apply ceramic coatings to painted surfaces. Two types microfibre allow you to adjust to the characteristics of the paintwork. Even application on complex shaped panels.

Do not reuse.

sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2M Suede EVO Applicators 10x10 (10 pack)

Brand: GYEON
SKU: 116071
Price: $14.99 (Tax included)

Availability: In Stock
Same Day Dispatch on orders before 12pm

Product images:
- https://www.carcareproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/q2m_suede2.jpg
- https://www.carcareproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/gyeon_suede_10x10_b39be964-2abd-447d-84d9-aacdb286b66b.jpg

Description:
GYEON Q2M Suede Applicator Cloths are soft, lint free and perfect in application of your favourite GYEON ceramic coating. Each cloth is composed of a synthetic microfibre material that is ultra-soft and ideal suited to application of coatings for paint and glass. It's recommended you use this in combination with GYEON Foam Applicator Blocks.

Product Features and Benefits:
- Soft and absorbent microfiber suede material
- Gentle on paint, won't scratch or damage the surface
- Efficiently removes water and residue for a streak-free finish
- Durable and long-lasting, even after multiple washes

The Gyeon Q2M Suede Applicator Cloth is an essential tool for any car enthusiast or professional detailer. This high-quality suede cloth is specifically designed for the application of Gyeon quartz coatings, ensuring that your coatings are applied evenly and with minimal wastage.

The suede material of this applicator cloth is ultra-soft and gentle on your vehicle's surface, so you can be confident that you're not causing any damage or scratching to your paintwork. It also has a high absorption rate, meaning that it can hold a large amount of product, making the application process quicker and more efficient.

Each towel measures 10cm X 10cm square in a 10 pack.

How to use:
1. Make sure the surface of your vehicle is clean and dry before you start the application process. This will help ensure that the coating adheres properly to the surface and provides the best possible protection.
2. Apply a small amount of your chosen Gyeon quartz coating onto the suede applicator cloth. You don't need to use a lot of product - a little goes a long way!
3. Apply the coating to the surface of your vehicle in a thin, even layer. Use light pressure and work in small sections to ensure that the coating is applied evenly.
4. Allow the coating to cure for the recommended time. The curing time will vary depending on the specific Gyeon quartz coating that you are using, so be sure to check the instructions on the product label.
5. Buff off any residue using a clean microfiber towel. Use a gentle circular motion to remove any excess product and bring out the shine in your vehicle's surface.
6. After use, wash the applicator cloth with warm water and allow it to air dry. This will help keep the suede material soft and ready for the next application.
